zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Chapman於1598年8月20日出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾順特時，他的父親Edward Chapman28歲，母親Mary P Gray26歲。他於1626年3月30日與Agnes Whiscarde在英國英格蘭賀特福爾維德福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1629年8月23日在英國英格蘭米德萊可享年31歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Chapman于1598年8月20日出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾順特时，他的父亲Edward Chapman28岁，母亲Mary P Gray26岁。他于1626年3月30日与Agnes Whiscarde在英国英格兰賀特福爾維德福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1629年8月23日在英国英格兰米德萊可享年31岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可。

nameMeanings.name: Chapman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

variants.name: Kaufman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Chaim, Emanuel, Moshe, Eytan, Herschel, Zvi, Ari, Aron.
Americanized form of German   Kaufmann  , and a variant of the same Jewish surname.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Kaufman meaning ‘merchant’. Compare Koyfman 2.

variants.name: Chipman
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Copeman
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): patronymic from the early Middle English personal name Cop(e)man, an Anglicized form of Old Scandinavian Kaupmaðr. It is a transferred use of Old Scandinavian kaupmaðr (Old Danish køpman) ‘merchant’, cognate with Old English cēapmann (see Chapman ), but there is no evidence for the occupational term in Middle English.
Americanized form of North German   Koopmann   or Dutch   Koopman  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Chapman was born on 20 August 1598, in Cheshunt, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edward Chapman, was 28 and his mother, Mary P Gray, was 26. He married Agnes Whiscarde on 30 March 1626, in Widford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 August 1629, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31, and was buried in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Chapman est né le 20 août 1598, à Cheshunt, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Chapman, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary P Gray, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Whiscarde le 30 mars 1626, à Widford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 août 1629, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Chapman am 20. August 1598 in Cheshunt, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Chapman 28 und seine Mutter Mary P Gray 26. Er hat am 30. März 1626 in Widford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Whiscarde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. August 1629 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Chapman è nato il il 20 agosto 1598 nel Cheshunt, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edward Chapman, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mary P Gray, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Whiscarde il 30 marzo 1626, nel Widford, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 agosto 1629, nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Chapmanが1598年8月20日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアチェシュントで生まれた時，父Edward Chapmanは28歳，母Mary P Grayは26歳であった。1626年3月30日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウィドフォードでAgnes Whiscardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1629年8月23日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスで31歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Chapman(이)가 1598년 8월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 체슈운트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Chapman(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary P Gray(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1626년 3월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 위드퍼드에서 Agnes Whiscarde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1629년 8월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에 묻혔다.

pt.20 August 1598–23 August 1629: 20 de agosto de 1598–23 de agosto de 1629
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Chapman nasceu em 20 de agosto de 1598, em Cheshunt, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Chapman, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary P Gray, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Whiscarde em 30 de março de 1626, em Widford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1629, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Chapman родился 20 августа 1598 г. в местности чешант, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edward Chapman было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary P Gray, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Whiscarde 30 марта 1626 г. в местности видфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 августа 1629 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Agnes Whiscarde el 30 de marzo de 1626, en Widford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de agosto de 1629, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
